headline: Ball to Announce First Quarter Earnings on May 5, 2026
summary: Ball Corporation (NYSE: BALL) will announce its first quarter 2026 earnings on Tuesday, May 5, 2026 before trading begins on the New York Stock Exchange. At 6:30 a.m. Mountain Time on that day (8:30 a.m. Eastern Time), Ball will hold its regular quarterly conference call on the company's results and performance.

headline: Ball Corporation (BALL): Upside Potential Grabs Attention of Billionaire David Tepper
summary: Ball Corporation (NYSE: BALL) is one of Billionaire David Tepper’s 10 Small and Midcap Stock Picks with Huge Upside Potential. Ball Corporation (NYSE: BALL) is a new addition to the 13F portfolio of Appaloosa Management LP.
